HGSS.652.0001:
Hello?
Oh, hello. How are you?\f
Kids nowadays can just call even though
they’re nearby...\f
I’d rather talk face-to-face...
HGSS.652.0003:
One of your Pokémon we’re raising is
holding an Egg!\f
I bet you’d like to know what kind of
Egg it is, right? You should come get it!
HGSS.652.0004:
We’re not raising any Pokémon for you
right now...\f
HGSS.652.0006:
Your [0100,000A,0000] and [0100,000B,0000]
are doing just fine.\f
HGSS.652.0007: The two seem to get along very well.\f
HGSS.652.0008: The two seem to get along.\f
HGSS.652.0009:
The two don’t seem to like each
other much.\f
HGSS.652.0010:
The two prefer to play separately more
than with each other...\f
HGSS.652.0011: Come stop by anytime, you hear?
HGSS.652.0012:
Hello? It’s me, the Day-Care Man.\f
We were raising your Pokémon,
and my goodness, were we surprised!\f
Your Pokémon was holding an Egg!\f
We don’t know how it got there,
but your Pokémon had it.\f
I bet you’d like to know what kind of
Egg it is, right? You should come get it!
HGSS.652.0013:
Hello? It’s me, the Day-Care Man.\f
Your Pokémon is holding an Egg!\f
I bet you’d like to know what kind of
Egg it is, right? You should come get it!
